leadText: Propeller Tail (Japanese: スクリューおびれ Screw Tailfin) is an Ability introduced in Generation VIII. It is the signature Ability of Arrokuda and Barraskewda.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Propeller Tail makes its user's moves ignore the target-redirecting effects of moves (e.g. Rage Powder , Follow Me , and Ally Switch ) and Abilities (e.g. Storm Drain and Lightning Rod ). Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Propeller Tail has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Propeller Tail makes its user's moves ignore the target-redirecting effects of moves (e.g. Rage Powder , Follow Me , and Ally Switch ) and Abilities (e.g. Storm Drain and Lightning Rod ).
